The Government Court: -
The following officers, who are awaiting appointment to the Tehsildar Cadre, have been posted in front of their name for administrative reasons at Column No. Capable of the position shown in 4
Appointment with the approval of the Authority in the interest of public service and administrative convenience.

2. The said order comes into immediate effect and the above mentioned officer has issued the order in column no. Immediately join the position of the post mentioned in section 4. The date on which the officer concerned appeared at the place of posting assigned to him.
The government should be informed immediately by email / post at e3.revenue@maharashtra.gov.in.
3. Maharashtra Civil Service (Retirement Period, Non-Service and Suspension, Dismissal and

The officer concerned shall take care of joining the place of posting within the prescribed period as per the rules in the Provisions for Removal from Service) Rules, 1981. Otherwise, the period of his absence is a "non-working day" (7) if he does not join the office of the incumbent. Those concerned should note that it will count as & 85/70 /.
4. Leave of the officer concerned for any reason without prior permission of the Government.

should not be approved. Also, as per Rule-30 (c) of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Leave) Rules, 1981, in case applications are received from officers transferred by the original office not to accept any leave applications, the same shall be returned by post to the concerned authorities at the original address.
